_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox vs Phillies preview: Sonny Gray faces Andrew Painter at 6:45 PM
items.snark: Kyle Schwarber going for six straight games with a homer, the Sox going for their 12th game scoring one run or fewer.

items.headline: Willson Contreras expected back Wednesday after hand scare, Roman Anthony still out
items.snark: Contreras hit in the cage so the hand works, now if only the rest of the lineup could find cages that produce runs.

items.headline: Phillies 2, Red Sox 1: Brayan Bello bounce back wasted by lifeless bats
items.snark: Sox held to one run or fewer for the 11th time in 41 games, which is honestly impressive in the wrong direction.

items.headline: Patriots to face Lions in Munich Week 10 international game on November 15
items.snark: Third Germany trip in four years because nothing says AFC champs like schlepping to Bavaria every other season.

items.headline: Patriots 2026 schedule release set for Thursday May 14 at 8 PM, leaks rolling
items.snark: Schedule drops Thursday which means 48 more hours of fans pretending the order of games actually matters in May.

items.headline: Patriots sign undrafted tryouts Xavier Holmes and Peter Manuma after minicamp
items.snark: Holmes and Manuma signed after minicamp, two dudes you'll forget by training camp but feel good about right now.

items.headline: Patriots international history: Six games abroad, 3 wins 2 losses entering Munich
items.snark: Six international games and a 3 to 2 record which is like bragging about your bowling average at the company picnic.

items.headline: Patriots hold joint practices with Eagles this summer ahead of preseason game
items.snark: Joint practices with Philly aka the AJ Brown Bowl where everyone pretends the trade isn't happening yet.
